caption: A video game captures an American football match played on a green field inside a crowded stadium. Players in white jerseys and white helmets compete against players in dark jerseys. A quarterback in white throws a pass towards a receiver. Overlaid on the gameplay is a small video window showing a man with blond hair wearing a blue shirt and headphones. As the play progresses, the on-screen text "PERFECT ACCURACY" and "BULLET PASS" appears in green and white. The top banner displays game statistics, including "3rd & 8", a score of "14" and "7", and a game clock at "3:26". By the end of the sequence, the man in the inset window reacts with an open-mouthed expression of excitement, and the view shifts to a close-up of him, filling a large portion of the screen while the game continues in the background.
